description: My primary cloud platform — I deploy scalable infrastructure using EC2, S3, Lambda, and CloudWatch for production-grade applications.
A developer-friendly cloud platform I use for quick, zero-config deployments of full-stack apps with built-in auto-scaling.
My go-to for frontend deployments — instant CI/CD, edge functions, and form handling make Netlify incredibly productive.
I use DigitalOcean Droplets and App Platform for affordable, reliable cloud hosting with straightforward server management.
Experienced with GoDaddy for domain registration, DNS management, and connecting custom domains to deployed applications.
I use Hostinger for budget-friendly shared and VPS hosting — great for client projects that need simple, fast deployment.
My most-used free hosting solution — I've shipped dozens of portfolio pieces, docs, and static sites directly from GitHub repos.
Containerization is core to my workflow — I build, ship, and run apps in Docker to eliminate environment inconsistencies across teams.
I orchestrate containerized workloads with Kubernetes — managing pods, services, and deployments for highly available systems.
Linux is my natural habitat — from shell scripting and cron jobs to server hardening and process management, I'm fully at home in the terminal.
I configure Nginx as a reverse proxy, load balancer, and static file server — a critical part of my production server setup.
Solid experience with Apache HTTP Server for hosting web apps, configuring virtual hosts, and managing .htaccess rules.
I automate everything with GitHub Actions — CI/CD pipelines, test runners, Docker builds, and deployment workflows all live in my repos.
I build robust GitLab CI/CD pipelines with multi-stage jobs, environment-specific deployments, and artifact caching strategies.
Experienced with Jenkins for enterprise-grade automation — building pipelines, managing plugins, and integrating with Docker and Git.
I architect multi-service apps using subdomains — routing api., admin., and app. prefixes with DNS and reverse proxy configurations.
I rely on Cloudflare for DNS management, DDoS protection, SSL termination, and edge caching to keep apps fast and secure globally.
